name: Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine the grated Parmesan cheese and mayonnaise. If desired, stir in snipped chives or parsley.
2. Set aside.
3. Slice French bread lengthwise or into slices. If using sliced bread, place it on the rack of a broiler pan.
4. Broil 3 to 4 inches from heat for about 1 minute, or until toasted.
5. Turn the bread over.
6. Spread some of the cheese-mayonnaise mixture on the untoasted or cut side of the bread.
7. Broil again, 3 to 4 inches from heat for 2 to 3 minutes, or until light brown.
